backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing IELTS test management with CRUD operations for tests and student responses, authentication for admin operations, automated scoring logic, and blob storage integration for media files.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old test data structure (without media field) to new structure (with optional media field) while preserving existing responses.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: 2-column reading layout, file upload for writing/listening tests, fullscreen mode activation, and exit fullscreen button.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React components, hooks, and configuration files describing their responsibilities and key functionality.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system with custom CSS variables for light and dark modes, including primary, secondary, accent, and semantic colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, page title 'IELTS Test Management by Sayem', and root div mounting the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing global application state (view modes, selected test, responses) and coordinating layout between test management sidebar and dynamic right panel.
frontend/src/components/AuthModal.tsx: Authentication dialog component with username/password form, error handling, loading states, and callbacks for successful login to enable test creation.
Dialog component for creating new tests with form fields for title, type, instructions, and questions. Handles validation, submission via mutation hook, and displays errors.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying "Powered By Sayem Ahtesham" text.
Card component for building individual test questions with support for multiple question types, options management, and file upload (audio/image) with progress tracking using ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/ReadingTestLayou: Two-panel layout component for reading tests displaying the passage on the left and current question on the right with scrollable areas.
frontend/src/components/ResponseDetailsP: Detailed view panel for a single student response showing student info, test details, scores, band score, and question-by-question breakdown with export functionality.
frontend/src/components/ResponseViewer.t: Table-based viewer for all student responses with search functionality, delete actions, and ability to select a response for detailed view.
frontend/src/components/ResultsPanel.tsx: Results display panel showing test performance metrics (score, band, accuracy, time), correct/wrong counts, and toggleable correct answers view with navigation back to home.
frontend/src/components/RightPanelContai: Container component that conditionally renders TestInterface, ResultsPanel, ResponseViewer, or a welcome screen based on the current app state and view mode.
frontend/src/components/StudentRegistrat: Modal dialog that collects student name and batch number before allowing test start, with validation and keyboard support.
frontend/src/components/TestInterface.ts: Main test-taking interface that manages student registration, question navigation, timer display, answer collection, fullscreen mode, and test submission with support for both reading and standard test layouts.
frontend/src/components/TestManagementPa: Left sidebar panel for managing tests with search/filter functionality, test list display, and buttons to create new tests or view responses, requiring authentication for test creation.
frontend/src/components/TestQuestionDisp: Renders individual test questions with support for multiple question types (multiple choice, true/false/not given, short/long answer, etc.) and displays associated media (audio/images).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Custom hook for simple username/password authentication with session storage persistence, hardcoded credentials for 'Sayem Ahtesham', and login/logout/credential retrieval functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Hook that manages fullscreen mode state and provides functions to enter/exit fullscreen, listening to browser fullscreen change events.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on tests and student responses, using the backend actor and managing cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useResponseManagement: Provides filtering logic for student responses based on student name search term.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestFiltering.ts: Manages test filtering state and logic for search term and test type filters.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestForm.ts: Manages test creation form state including questions, validation, and conversion between form data and backend Test type with media support.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestSubmission.ts: Handles test submission logic including answer grading, band score calculation, and creating student response records.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestTimer.ts: Provides timer functionality with start, pause, reset controls and formatted time display for test-taking sessions.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending default theme with custom colors using OKLCH, animations, and container settings for the design system.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking an IELTS test management application with features for 2-column reading layout, file uploads for writing/listening tests, and fullscreen mode. Contains existing implemented features and pending feature requests for reading tests, file uploads, and fullscreen functionality.
